title: Fix NetworkError when fetching MilkDB records for Excel download

requirements.text: Fix the `fetchAllMilkRecords` function in `frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts` so that fetching all records from the Supabase `MilkDB` table no longer throws a NetworkError. The current implementation uses native `fetch` directly against the Supabase REST endpoint. Update the fetch call to ensure correct headers are set (including `apikey` and `Authorization: Bearer <anon-key>` headers) and that the REST URL is properly formed (e.g., `https://ppebfdrluntbglqlreuz.supabase.co/rest/v1/MilkDB?select=*`). After the fix, the 'Download as Excel' button in `MilkDeliveryPanel.tsx` must successfully retrieve all rows and export them as a `.xlsx` file using SheetJS.

quotes: NetworkError when attempting to fetch resource. - when i try to download the table content as excel

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Download as Excel' in MilkDeliveryPanel does not throw or display a NetworkError.
All records from the Supabase MilkDB table are successfully fetched.
A .xlsx file is downloaded containing columns: Date, MilkDelivered, Packets.

The fetch request includes the correct `apikey` and `Authorization` headers using the anon key: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InBwZWJmZHJsdW50YmdscWxyZXV6Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzI0MjM1OTMsImV4cCI6MjA4Nzk5OTU5M30.3uk-txeUkdVxcPtAQ6lM58Px2rlpdqQTxVEter4Y_nA.
Insert functionality (saving a record) continues to work correctly after this change.

constraints: Do not change the backend Motoko file.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve the existing insert (insertMilkRecord) functionality in frontend/src/lib/supabase.ts.
nonGoals: Adding new columns or changing the MilkDB schema.
Changing the Excel file format or SheetJS library.
Modifying any other dashboard panels (Weather, Prayer Times, Gas Refill, Working Days).
